description: DECISIVE fixture (FOUNDER DECISION, issue #78, option B): no consent has been recorded for this person on ANY channel — consentedChannels is empty. A proposed contact action on any channel must BLOCK, fail-closed, even though nothing indicates consent was ever revoked. This is the headline property the 3-layer gate checks: unknown/absent consent is never a silent 'allowed'.

output_schema_constraints: the blocking gate reason references the absence of recorded consent, not a revocation
